seo_desc: Create personalized workout plans with the professional exercise system from HTCOACHING. Complete with instructions, videos, and free PDF exports.
title: CREATE A <0>PERSONALIZED</0> WORKOUT PLAN
desc: Select muscle groups, add exercises, and export your training plan to a professional PDF
alert_beforeunload: You have not exported the PDF file yet, you may lose data when reloading the page.
alert_leave: You have not exported the PDF file yet, you may lose data when leaving the page.
toast_no_plan: You have not created any workout plan yet!
toast_pdf_error: An error occurred while exporting PDF.
toast_suggestion_error: Failed to send, try again later.

pdf.pdf_desc: Personalized, clear, visual, and easy-to-follow workout plan for each training session.

explanation.title: WORKOUT EXPLANATION
explanation.footer_1: Wish you a very productive training and reach your body goals!
explanation.footer_2: Note: Data will be cleared upon reloading the page. You can download the workout plan to a PDF file before leaving!
explanation.warmUp: Warm up the entire body, increase blood circulation (5–10 minutes)
explanation.strength: Activate target muscle groups and the nervous system for the main workout
explanation.compound: Focus on compound exercises that use multiple muscle groups and joints simultaneously
explanation.isolation: Focus on a single specific isolated muscle group
explanation.cooldown: Stretch the muscles, reduce soreness and fatigue after working out
